---
title: "Sachin Subedi"
image: /images/46967418.png
about: 
  template: trestles
  image-shape: rectangle
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/Oluwatosin-Babasola
    - icon: google
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=HEXXuBQAAAAJ&view_op=list_works&authuser=1&sortby=pubdate
    - icon: 0-circle-fill
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1145-8880
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tosin-babasola/
    - icon: envelope-paper-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:Babasolaoluwatosin@yahoo.com
    - icon: r-square-fill
      text: x
      href: https://www.x.com/thosine_babs
    - icon: x
      text: Website
      href: https://oluwatosin-babasola.github.io//
---

I am an applied mathematician who conduct research  at the University of Georgia, focusing on Genomic Epidemiology. My research involves developing advanced computational and statistical methods to understand the ecology, epidemiology, evolution, and transmission dynamics of viruses with pandemic potential, like Highly Pathogenic Avian Influenza.

# Research Area

- **Infectious Disease Modeling**
- **Applied Mathematics**
- **Predictive modeling**
- **Machine Learning**
- **Option pricing**
